# Analysis Report Template

This skill provides the standardized report template for formatting test hardening analysis results.

## Usage

Before generating any analysis output, read the report template to ensure compliance with the required structure.

| Template | Purpose | When to Use |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| [analysis-report-template.md](references/analysis-report-template.md) | Structured format for test code analysis | When producing a test hardening analysis report |

## Rules

- You MUST follow the exact report format defined in the template
- Do NOT create your own report structure — use only the predefined template sections
- Do not deviate from the template format under any circumstances
